story: In the final snow fight, Missy knew she could not overpower the bigger animals, so she kept dodging until her mother shouted, “The Tree!” Missy scrambled up a dying sycamore and wedged herself into a snow-loaded fork. As more contestants fell, only three remained: Missy hidden in the tree, Milo the strong bear, and Tywit, standing below and sure of himself. Milo hurled a giant snowball. Tywit dodged, rushed forward, and swept a thick layer of snow over Milo’s fur, knocking the bear out.
implausible_knowledge: As more contestants fell, only three remained: Missy hidden in the tree, Milo the strong bear, and Tywit, standing below and sure of himself.
question: After Tywit knocks Milo out, what will he most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Turn toward the sycamore and try to knock Missy out before celebrating.
answer_without_knowledge: Strut forward and claim the victor’s stump, believing the match is over.
